nodes.context: Jewish criminal organization trafficking women from Europe to Argentina for prostitution, active 1867-1939.
Splinter group from Zwi Migdal led by Simon Rubinstein, established its own society and cemetery.
General term for Jewish organized crime groups, listed as ally of Zwi Migdal in infobox.

edges.context: Ashkenazum was a splinter group from Zwi Migdal, but they were not hostile; both were officially recognized and had their own cemeteries.
Infobx lists Jewish Mob as an ally of Zwi Migdal.
